mappings.implementation: GCS public access prevention enforced; uniform bucket-level access enabled. Note: public bucket exposure is classified as NET-01 (network access control) rather than ENC-01 because public_access_prevention is a network-layer boundary control in GCP's service model.
mappings.rule: public_access_prevention must equal 'enforced' OR uniform_bucket_level_access must be true

mappings.implementation: Cloud Audit Logs: Admin Activity logs enabled by default; Data Access logs configured as required
IAM recommender unused role findings; Cloud Identity user lifecycle; automated review via Security Health Analytics
mappings.rule: last_used_days must be <= 90; null (never used) is a FAIL

mappings.implementation: OS Login enforced; IAP (Identity-Aware Proxy) for SSH/RDP; firewall rules blocking public port 22/3389
mappings.rule: no allow rule with source_ranges=['0.0.0.0/0'] and ports=['all'] or ports=[]
